calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Petitioners Weicong Zhu and Yanqing Chen, were present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the minor YingYing Chen, and with Cantonese Interpreter Stella.
Petitioners and Interpreter were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

Matter was called and continued for the petitioners to return with proof of residency in San Francisco.

Matter recalled at 11:48. The petitioners provided the court a letter from their bank, that stated their address as being in San Francisco.

No objections to the proposed change of name of a minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to Joanne Zhu.
